title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: UB in WebAssemblyMemoryGrow because AddressType is constructed from on-heap data
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the V8 sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
During the growth of a WASM heap memory object, `WebAssemblyMemoryGrow` constructs an `AddressType` enum variant from on-heap data and passes it to a `switch` instruction, causing undefined behavior.

#### VERSION
V8 commit: `ab875b6ed878b0b1934ab935366224ee4c761985` (2025
